name: Instant Personal Loan's
description_short: Speedy Payday Loans is a free loan-matching service connecting borrowers with short-term lenders for bad credit, personal, and payday loans, with next-business-day funding possible.
description_long:
Instant Loans (operating under the brand Speedy Payday Loans) is a free online loan-matching platform with a physical Detroit location at 4225 Monterey St. The service is designed to connect consumers — particularly those with poor or limited credit histories — with a network of third-party lenders offering short-term loan products. The company is not itself a lender and does not make credit decisions or set loan terms.

The platform offers access to bad credit loans, personal loans, and unsecured loans. Consumers complete a single online inquiry form and are matched with lenders in the network. Participating lenders may offer fast approval decisions, soft credit inquiries on some products, funding as soon as the next business day, and no prepayment penalties on most loans. The matching service itself charges no fees to the borrower.

What distinguishes Speedy Payday Loans from direct lenders is its positioning as a neutral connector. The platform emphasizes inclusivity for borrowers across all credit score ranges, SSL and TLS security for data transmission, and a no-fee model for consumers. The Detroit page also lists a local phone number and street address, suggesting some localized customer support capacity alongside the online form.

Honestly, this is a lead-generation platform first and foremost. Submitting a form means your personal and financial data will be shared with third-party lenders and marketing partners. The platform explicitly acknowledges it may connect users with tribal lenders, which operate under different regulatory frameworks than state-licensed lenders and may carry higher APRs. No rate ranges, loan amounts, or lender names are disclosed upfront, making it impossible to evaluate true cost before applying. Borrowers should treat this as a starting point for comparison, not a vetted lender relationship.
pros: Free matching service — no fees charged to the consumer at any point
Accepts all credit types including poor and bad credit scores
Funding possible as soon as the next business day
Soft credit inquiries available on select loan products
No prepayment penalties on most loans in the network
256-bit SSL encryption and TLS security for data protection
Single short online form to reach multiple lenders simultaneously
cons: Not a direct lender — actual rates, terms, and lender quality are unknown until after form submission
Personal data is shared with third-party marketing partners, not just lenders
May match users with tribal lenders subject to fewer consumer protections than state-licensed lenders
No APR range, loan amount range, or lender names disclosed on the website
Service not available in all states
best_for: Borrowers with bad or no credit who need fast access to short-term loan options
Consumers who want to cast a wide net across multiple lenders with one application
Detroit-area residents seeking a local point of contact alongside an online service
People who need emergency cash and can accept next-business-day funding timelines
diagnosis: Best suited for credit-challenged borrowers in Detroit or nearby states who need emergency funds quickly and are willing to share their information with a lender network in exchange for fast matching. The main caveat is that this is a lead-generation intermediary, not a lender — consumers have no visibility into rates or lender identity before submitting personal data, and tribal lender matches may carry significantly higher costs than state-regulated alternatives.
